title: Human-in-the-Loop Integrations
learning_outcomes: Explain execution interruption mechanics and manual payload injections.

content_sections.title: Execution Interruption and Approval Checkpoints
content_sections.content: For safety-critical actions (e.g. sending emails or executing financial transfers), agents must not operate autonomously. We insert **human-in-the-loop checkpoints** that pause the execution thread before executing specific nodes. The system awaits manual review, resuming execution only after receiving approval or modification payloads.
